headline: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: busy executives who want a real personal assistant AI assistant
busy executives who want a real personal assistant personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: A cinematic, conversion‑focused niche landing page that reuses Super’s proven comparison‑page architecture. It speaks directly to busy executives who want a real personal assistant — not another chat window — grounding the pitch in current reporting on agentic AI, computer‑use assistants, and executive productivity. Super is positioned as the sharper alternative for repeated executive workflows thanks to real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache.
